DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `debts`;
CREATE TABLE `debts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('hutang','pinjam') NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','paid') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `due_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `debts_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `payments`;
CREATE TABLE `payments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `debt_id` int NOT NULL,
  `payment_amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `payment_date` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `proof_image` longtext,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `debt_id` (`debt_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `payments_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`debt_id`) REFERENCES `debts` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `users`;

  `username` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
